3199030.name: 2nd child Demo
3199030.description:
Single player Hack and slash/beat em up

3rd person action game!

Play on the PC using keyboard or controller

EXCITING 3D ACTION

3D graphics, Egyptian styled fantasy game with simple controls to make for free-flowing and fast-paced hack-and-slash action. Play in single-player mode only for demo. There will be multiplayer in the full release.

In a world where evil is silent where you can live freely and be good hearted, be aware that evil is paying attention and is seeking its chance to strike. Sometimes you have to put forth your strength to defeat the evil forces and survive or be slaughtered and forgotten about. Colinzo, a dirty scumbag bully who wants to take over your world is approaching. Your mission is to destroy him and his bloodline of evil using power of what the gods gave you.

SPECIAL MOVES

Unleash kira unique special moves to slash your way to victory, you can use the Firemob combo, spin technique and an atom bomb to clear enemies out of your way and more..

Use your skills to your advantage to make your way through the obstacles.
3199030.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
